name: Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend the oil and sugars on low until well mixed.
2. Add vanilla extract.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
4. Stir together dry ingredients and add to egg mixture until well blended.
5. Stir in walnuts and carrots by hand.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan or fluted pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes.
8. Cool in the pan, then top with powdered sugar or frosting of your choice.
